name: Ingest → Clean → Embed
description: Pull documents from connectors, normalize text, chunk, and embed into the vector index with deduplication.

name: Eval Harness (Golden Set)
description: Runs prompts against a frozen golden set, captures latency and token usage, and scores answers with rubrics.

name: Release Notes Generator
description: Summarizes merged PRs and issues into customer-facing notes with tone controls and safety filters.

name: Support Ticket Triage
description: Classifies tickets, suggests macros, and routes to teams with confidence scores and escalation rules.

name: Schema Mapper (CSV → JSON)
description: Infer column types, propose JSON schema, and validate sample rows before import jobs.

name: Code Review Assist
description: Surfaces risky diffs, suggests tests, and links to internal style guides for each language detected.
